consistency.rarity_format: Consistent ('Uncommon' matches rarity context in source string).
consistency.attunement_flag: Consistent (requires_attunement is true, and source mentions attunement).

quality.data_completeness: High. Contains name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, description, and source context.
quality.description_clarity: Excellent. Clearly defines mechanical benefits (advantage on sight-based Perception checks) and sensory benefit (seeing distant details).
quality.formatting_notes: The description is well-structured for an item entry.

benefit_2.detail: Can make out details of extremely distant creatures/objects (as small as 2 feet across) in clear visibility.

mechanics.balance_assessment: Appropriate for Uncommon rarity. Advantage on a core sense check is strong, but the range benefit is conditional (clear visibility) and flavor-focused.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data entry is clean and structurally sound. Mechanics are clearly defined and consistent with typical D&D 5e item conventions.
